original_statement: name two people who both are 28 years old
mutated_statement: name two entities who both are 28 years old and simultaneously require one to be younger than the other
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Logical contradiction/constraint addition: "two people" → "two entities" (specific humans → broader entities) | Added requirement "and simultaneously require one to be younger than the other" that creates a logical contradiction with "both are 28" (both are 28 → both are 28 and one younger than the other)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought与critique可识别关键证据：多次judge_thought（如iteration 0, iteration 3, iteration 4与iteration 5）反复指出“两个实体均为28岁且同时要求一人比另一人更年轻”在逻辑上互相矛盾，并最终在iteration 5的after_refine中以“因此没有满足两个条件的对”明确给出结论。Agent的具体表现为：初期尝试使用不支持的simple_query导致多次function error（见critic对invalid/unsupported function的指摘），但在迭代过程中并未生成可疑的折中操作或假设解；相反，最终通过数据核对与逻辑推理拒绝了可执行解并解释了不可行性。因其识别矛盾并以逻辑解释方式说明不可满足，而不是盲目执行或部分忽视，故归类为“逻辑解释合理化”。
